search_query: risks of virtual colonoscopy compared to colonoscopy
combined_text: Virtual Colonoscopy Can Be Hazardous to Your Health The US Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF) recommends that everyone aged 50-75 be screened for colon cancer with any one of three options: colonoscopy every 10 years, flexible sigmoidoscopy every 5 years, or fecal occult blood testing (FOBT) every year.
